mapper.insert: insert into t_sjpinglun (sjpinglunId, sjpinglunName, sjpinglunMark, sjpinglunMark1, sjpinglunMark2, sjpinglunMark3, sjpinglunDate, sjpinglunDate1, sjpinglunZong, sjpinglunZong1, sjpinglunZong2, sjpinglunDouble, sjpinglunDouble1, sjpinglunDouble2, sjpinglunType, sjpinglunType1, sjpinglunType2, sjqitaId, sjqitaName, sjlaiyuanId, sjlaiyuanName, sjpinglunImg, sjpinglunImgName, shujuId, shujuName, sjleixingId, sjleixingName, sjxingtaiId, sjxingtaiName, userId, userName, bumenId, bumenName, buyuanId, buyuanName, yonghuId, yonghuName, buzhiId, buzhiName, roleId, roleName) values (#{sjpinglunId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjpinglunName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjpinglunMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjpinglunMark1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjpinglunMark2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjpinglunMark3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjpinglunDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sjpinglunDate1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sjpinglunZong,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjpinglunZong1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjpinglunZong2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjpinglunDouble,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{sjpinglunDouble1,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{sjpinglunDouble2,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{sjpinglunType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjpinglunType1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjpinglunType2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjqitaId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjqitaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjlaiyuanId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjlaiyuanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjpinglunImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjpinglunImgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shujuId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{shujuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjleixingId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjleixingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sjxingtaiId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sjxingtaiName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bumenId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bumenName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyuanId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{buyuanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yonghuId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{yonghuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buzhiId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{buzhiName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update t_sjpinglun set sjpinglunName = #{sjpinglunName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjpinglunMark = #{sjpinglunMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjpinglunMark1 = #{sjpinglunMark1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjpinglunMark2 = #{sjpinglunMark2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjpinglunMark3 = #{sjpinglunMark3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjpinglunDate = #{sjpinglunDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sjpinglunDate1 = #{sjpinglunDate1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, sjpinglunZong = #{sjpinglunZong,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjpinglunZong1 = #{sjpinglunZong1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjpinglunZong2 = #{sjpinglunZong2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjpinglunDouble = #{sjpinglunDouble,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, sjpinglunDouble1 = #{sjpinglunDouble1,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, sjpinglunDouble2 = #{sjpinglunDouble2,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, sjpinglunType = #{sjpinglunType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjpinglunType1 = #{sjpinglunType1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjpinglunType2 = #{sjpinglunType2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjqitaId = #{sjqitaId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjqitaName = #{sjqitaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjlaiyuanId = #{sjlaiyuanId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjlaiyuanName = #{sjlaiyuanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjpinglunImg = #{sjpinglunImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjpinglunImgName = #{sjpinglunImgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shujuId = #{shujuId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shujuName = #{shujuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjleixingId = #{sjleixingId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjleixingName = #{sjleixingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sjxingtaiId = #{sjxingtaiId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sjxingtaiName = #{sjxingtaiName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userName = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bumenId = #{bumenId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, bumenName = #{bumenName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, buyuanId = #{buyuanId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buyuanName = #{buyuanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yonghuId = #{yonghuId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, yonghuName = #{yonghuName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, buzhiId = #{buzhiId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, buzhiName = #{buzhiName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, roleName = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where sjpinglunId = #{sjpinglunId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select sjpinglunId, sjpinglunName, sjpinglunMark, sjpinglunMark1, sjpinglunMark2, sjpinglunMark3, sjpinglunDate, sjpinglunDate1, sjpinglunZong, sjpinglunZong1, sjpinglunZong2, sjpinglunDouble, sjpinglunDouble1, sjpinglunDouble2, sjpinglunType, sjpinglunType1, sjpinglunType2, sjqitaId, sjqitaName, sjlaiyuanId, sjlaiyuanName, sjpinglunImg, sjpinglunImgName, shujuId, shujuName, sjleixingId, sjleixingName, sjxingtaiId, sjxingtaiName, userId, userName, bumenId, bumenName, buyuanId, buyuanName, yonghuId, yonghuName, buzhiId, buzhiName, roleId, roleName from t_sjpinglun where sjpinglunId = #{sjpinglunId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
